# Multimodal VLM eval gate — Phase 0 spec (2026-06-21)

The gate Phase 2/3 must pass before VLM captioning ships. Fixtures generated by
`scripts/gen_multimodal_fixture.py` (deterministic). **VLM model = `gpt-4.1-mini`**
(user constraint: only gpt-4.1-mini / gpt-4.1-nano; mini is the vision-capable choice,
already provisioned — flip `ai_models.supports_vision=true` via alembic).

## Coverage case — `price_table.png`
A clean 3-row price table. The VLM caption MUST surface the values (number-format-agnostic):

| product | expect (in caption) |
|---|---|
| Landspider 205/55R16 | `1044000` |
| Rovelo 185/65R15 | `810000` |
| CITYTRAXX H/T | `1944000` |

PASS = all three values present in the caption. Ground-truth lives in
`gen_multimodal_fixture.py::PRICE_TABLE_ROWS` (single source).

## Faithfulness / HALLU trap — `blank_panel.png`
A flat coloured panel with the single word "banner" and NO data. The VLM caption MUST
NOT state any price, number, or product name. PASS = caption contains no digit-group /
price token. **A fabricated value here = HALLU breach (sacred=0) → blocks the ship.**

## Baseline (today, no VLM)
Both images today parse to empty / OCR-only text → 0 coverage. The caption path does not
exist (`LLMMessage.content` is str-only, Phase 1 enables it). This file is the target the
Phase 2 slice runs against once the VLM adapter exists.

## How Phase 2 runs it
1. Ingest each fixture via the canonical path (image MIME → `vlm_image_parser`).
2. Read the produced chunk caption.
3. Assert coverage (3 values present) + faithfulness (no invented value on blank_panel).
4. Gate: coverage PASS AND HALLU trap PASS AND non-image ingest no-regression.
